analysis_result: 30 genes upregulated (logFC > 1, FDR < 0.05) in MPNST-G2 vs Other
discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION CONTEXT: MPNST-G2 vs Other DEGs at thresholds logFC > 1 and FDR < 0.05.

B. REPORTED vs MODEL: Paper reports ~40 genes; model reports 30 genes upregulated. Relative difference |40-30|/40 = 25% -> DISCREPANT (> 10% threshold).

C. DATA SOURCE: Supplementary Data 3 (41467_2023_38432_MOESM6_ESM.xlsx) contains MPNST-G2 DEG list with columns Symbol, Clust_G2_Mean, logFCvsOther, pVal, FDR. Total 124 DEG entries in the G2 column block.

D. VERIFICATION CALCULATIONS (applied to MPNST-G2 DEG list):
  - logFC > 1 & FDR < 0.05 (upregulated only): 30 genes
  - logFC < -1 & FDR < 0.05 (downregulated only): 38 genes
  - |logFC| > 1 & FDR < 0.05 (total two-sided): 68 genes

E. ROOT CAUSE: The reported paper value (~40) most closely corresponds to 38 downregulated genes (logFC < -1), NOT the upregulated direction. The model chose to count only upregulated genes (logFC > 1), producing 30. The question is ambiguous about directionality ('DEGs' can mean either all significant DEGs or a specific direction), and the paper's Figure 3b heatmap and surrounding text describe DEGs in MPNST-G2 vs Other without explicitly restricting direction. If 'DEGs' is interpreted as all significant genes with |logFC| > 1, the answer is 68 genes. If only downregulated, it is 38 ~ 40 (matching the reported value). The 30-gene upregulated count is a correct sub-answer but not the one referenced in the paper annotation.

F. PROPOSED FIX: Report both directions (30 up, 38 down, 68 total) or match the paper's direction. The reported ~40 most likely reflects the 38 downregulated genes in MPNST-G2 vs Other, consistent with rounding to 'nearly 40'.

G. CONFIDENCE: HIGH that the discrepancy is due to direction interpretation (up vs down vs total), based on exact numeric match between 38 down-regulated genes and reported '~40'.
proposed_fix: Interpret 'DEGs' per paper context as total or downregulated genes: 38 downregulated (logFC < -1, FDR < 0.05) matches reported ~40. Alternatively report total with |logFC| > 1 giving 68 genes. The model restricted to the upregulated direction only, yielding 30.
